title: docs/manpage: --volume doesn't mention additional mount options such as exec
body:
The documentation for `--volume` says
```
The OPTIONS are a comma delimited list and can be:
              · [rw|ro]
              · [z|Z]
              · [[r]shared|[r]slave|[r]private]
```

But it seems it's possible to specify additional options such as `exec`.

comments.body: This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
